challenges.name: Ingredient Selection
challenges.description: Choose ingredients that satisfy Mr. Sausage's demands.
challenges.quip: Let's see what you're made of...

challenges.name: Chopping
challenges.quip: Chop chop. Every second wasted is a second closer to failure.

challenges.name: Grinding
challenges.description: Grind the ingredients at the right speed.
challenges.quip: Time to grind. And I mean that literally.

challenges.name: Stuffing
challenges.description: Stuff the casing without letting pressure burst it.
challenges.quip: Stuff it. Carefully. Or it's YOUR casing next.

challenges.name: Cooking
challenges.description: Cook the sausage to the perfect temperature.
challenges.quip: Fire it up. Don't burn my kitchen.

challenges.name: Blowout
challenges.description: Aim at the cereal box and tie the casing before pressure builds.
challenges.quip: Tie it off. One wrong move and... BOOM.

challenges.name: Tasting
challenges.description: Mr. Sausage renders his final verdict.
challenges.quip: Now I taste. And I judge.
